name: Dutch Hot Pot
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Boneless pork shoulder, cut into cubes
4 medium Potatoes, sliced into 1/4 inch rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from pork. Shake cubes of pork in a plastic bag with flour to coat well.
2. Mix salt, crumbled thyme, crushed coriander seeds, and pepper in a cup; reserve the mixture.
3. Drain liquid from kidney beans into a 2-cup measure; add boiling water to make 1-1/2 cups.
4. Layer vegetables and meat into a slow cooker as follows: Alternate layers of half potatoes, onions, pork, kidney beans, and carrots, sprinkling each layer lightly with the seasoning mixture. Repeat with remaining vegetables, pork, and seasoning mixture for a second layer.
5. Pour liquid over; dot with butter or margarine. Cover.
6. Cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 4 hours, or until meat and vegetables are tender.
